about.metaDescription: Learn more about Sound It - your gateway to China's best nightlife and events.
about.title: About Sound It
about.subtitle: Your gateway to the best nightlife and events across China.
about.heroDescription: Sound It is a cultural and entertainment brand focused on creating meaningful music experiences and platforms that connect Africa, China, and the global community. Built on authenticity, quality, and community.
about.heroSubDescription: Established April 2020 in Lin'an, Hangzhou. Now based in Shanghai, China. Music • Events • Culture • Technology • Creative Ecosystems
about.missionText: To deliver immersive music and cultural experiences that connect artists, audiences, and brands globally, blending creativity, authenticity, and innovation.
about.visionText: To be the leading entertainment company that shapes global music culture while empowering talent and creating unforgettable experiences.

entities.name: Sound It Events
entities.description: Curated parties, showcases, and cultural gatherings blending African and global music with modern nightlife culture.

entities.name: RNB & Slow Sessions
entities.description: A signature event series dedicated to soulful music, R&B, slow jams, and timeless classics. 10+ editions hosted.

entities.name: Sound It Festival
entities.description: A premium indoor music and culture experience launching in 2026. Single-stage, industrial-style festival in Shanghai.

entities.name: Sound It Salone
entities.description: A digital ticketing platform for seamless ticket sales, audience data insights, and brand integration.

entities.name: Sound It Play
entities.description: A music streaming and distribution platform focused on supporting African artists, starting with Sierra Leone.

entities.name: SoundIt DJ Ecosystem
entities.description: A DJ-focused digital ecosystem for performance analysis, playlist management, and data-driven insights.

values.title: Creativity & Innovation
values.description: We constantly explore new ways to entertain and engage audiences.

values.title: Authenticity
values.description: Every event and production reflects real music culture.

values.title: Community & Collaboration
values.description: We build bridges between artists, brands, and audiences.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Quality and attention to detail are at the heart of every project.

values.title: Global Perspective
values.description: We merge local culture with international reach.

about.leadershipDescription: Sound It Events & RNB & Slow Sessions are powered by a dedicated leadership team committed to culture, quality, and long-term growth.
about.collaborationsDescription: Over the past two years, Sound It Events & RNB & Slow Sessions have successfully collaborated with internationally recognized DJs and influencers, strengthening our position as a cross-cultural entertainment platform in China.
about.strategicValueQuote: We are positioned as a bridge between African sound, international culture, and the Chinese nightlife market.
about.whyItMattersSubtitle: Behind every Sound It event is:
about.whyItMattersClosing: We are not just event organizers — we are an organized entertainment company building sustainable cultural experiences.
strategicValueItems: Bridge between African sound & Chinese market

help.pageTitle: Help Center & Support Policy | Sound It
help.metaDescription: Sound It Help Center and Support Policy. Find answers about tickets, payments, accounts, and platform use.
help.subtitle: Guidance, support scope, and answers to common questions.

faq.gs1Question: How do I create an account?
faq.gs1Answer: Click Sign Up, provide your email or phone number, create a password, and verify your account. You can then complete your profile and start exploring events.
faq.gs2Question: Is the platform free to use?
faq.gs2Answer: Browsing events and basic features are free. Some organizer, artist, or vendor features may require a subscription or service fees.
faq.gs3Question: How do I navigate the platform?
faq.gs3Answer: Use the top navigation or mobile menu to browse events, artists, venues, food spots, and community posts. Your dashboard shows personalized content based on your role.
faq.tp1Answer: Select an event, choose your ticket type and quantity, and complete checkout. You will receive a confirmation via email or in-app notification.
faq.tp2Answer: We support integrated platform payments, Alipay, WeChat Pay, and organizer-provided payment methods for Premium-tier accounts.
faq.tp3Answer: All ticket sales are final unless required by law, the event is cancelled, or the organizer approves a refund. Event-specific refund policies are shown on each event page.
faq.tp4Answer: Check your payment details, ensure sufficient funds, and try again. If the issue persists, contact your payment provider or our support team.
faq.tp5Answer: Approved refunds are typically processed within 5–15 business days to the original payment method.
faq.tp6Question: What if an event is cancelled?
faq.tp6Answer: If an event is cancelled, you are generally eligible for a refund. Refunds are processed via the original payment method.
faq.ac1Question: How do I update my profile?
faq.ac1Answer: Go to Account Settings, select Profile, and update your information. Remember to save your changes.
faq.ac2Question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
faq.ac2Answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page, enter your email or phone number, and follow the reset instructions sent to you.
faq.ac3Question: How do I change my email or phone number?
faq.ac3Answer: In Account Settings, select Contact Information. You may need to verify the new email or phone number before the change takes effect.
faq.ac4Question: How can I delete my account?
faq.ac4Answer: Contact our support team to request account deletion. We will verify your identity and process the request in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
faq.or1Question: How do I create an event?
faq.or1Answer: From your organizer dashboard, click Create Event, fill in the details (name, date, venue, tickets), and publish when ready.
faq.or2Question: How do I manage ticket sales?
faq.or2Answer: Use the Events section in your dashboard to view sales, check attendee lists, and set capacity limits.
faq.or3Question: What are my responsibilities as an organizer?
faq.or3Answer: You are responsible for accurate event information, legal compliance, honoring valid tickets, and managing refunds and cancellations.
faq.or4Question: Can I use my own payment methods?
faq.or4Answer: Premium-tier organizers can use organizer-managed payment methods such as WeChat Pay or Alipay QR codes.
faq.ar1Question: How do I set up an artist profile?
faq.ar1Answer: Register as an artist, upload your portfolio, add genres and availability, and publish your profile so organizers can find you.
faq.ar2Answer: Organizers can send booking requests through the platform. You can accept, decline, or negotiate terms via your artist dashboard.
faq.ar3Answer: Keep your profile updated, share events you are playing at, and engage with the community to increase visibility.
faq.ve1Question: How do I register as a vendor?
faq.ve1Answer: Apply through the vendor registration form, provide business details, and wait for verification. Once approved, you can list products and services.
faq.ve2Answer: Use the Orders tab in your vendor dashboard to view, approve, and fulfill orders.
faq.ve3Question: Can I sell at multiple events?
faq.ve3Answer: Yes. You can apply for booth spaces at different events through the Event Booths section in your dashboard.

help.adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search or category filter.
help.supportTeam: Our support team is here to assist you.
help.urgentIssues: For urgent issues, please include your order or event ID in your message.

policy.purposeContent:
The Help Center is designed to provide users with accessible guidance regarding the use of Sound It services, including event discovery, ticketing, account management, and platform participation as organizers, artists, or vendors.

This resource is informational in nature and does not constitute legal, financial, or contractual advice.
policy.categoriesContent:
Users may access support content organized under the following categories:

  • All — A consolidated view of all available help articles and resources.
  • Getting Started — Covers onboarding procedures, including account registration, profile setup, and general platform navigation.
  • Tickets & Payments — Includes guidance on ticket purchases, accepted payment methods, transaction processing, confirmations, and general refund policies. Sound It facilitates transactions but may not act as the merchant of record in all cases. Payment disputes may require resolution with third-party payment providers or event organizers.
  • Account — Provides assistance with account access, profile updates, credential management, and security practices.
  • Organizers — Includes instructions and best practices for event creation, management, promotion, and audience engagement. Organizers are solely responsible for the accuracy of event details, pricing, compliance with applicable laws, and fulfillment of advertised services.
  • Artists — Provides guidance for artist profiles, bookings, and promotional tools available on the Platform.
  • Vendors — Includes onboarding and operational guidance for service providers engaging with event organizers through the Platform.
policy.supportContent:
Availability

Sound It provides customer support on a reasonable-efforts basis. Standard response time is 24 to 48 hours, excluding weekends and public holidays unless otherwise stated.

Scope of Support

Support services include:

  • Technical assistance
  • General platform guidance
  • Issue reporting

Support services do not include:

  • Legal dispute resolution
  • Direct intervention in organizer-user conflicts
  • Financial reimbursement decisions outside platform policy
policy.contactContent:
Users may contact Sound It through the following official channels:

  • Email: support@sounditent.com
  • Phone: +86 19121317942
  • WeChat: @soundit_events

All communications must be conducted in good faith. Abuse, harassment, or misuse of support channels may result in restricted access or account action.
policy.liabilityContent:
To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sound It disclaims liability for:

  • User errors or misunderstandings of platform features
  • Organizer-related issues, including cancellations or misrepresentations
  • Third-party payment processing failures
  • Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
policy.modificationsContent: Sound It reserves the right to update or modify this Help Center & Support Policy at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of such changes.
policy.governingContent: This policy shall be interpreted in conjunction with the Platform’s Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. In the event of conflict, the Terms of Service shall prevail.
policy.finalContent: If any provision of this policy is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

press.metaDescription: Latest news, press releases, and media resources for Sound It.
press.title: Press & Media
press.subtitle: Latest news and updates from Sound It
press.noReleases: No press releases at the moment.

privacy.metaDescription: Sound It Privacy Policy compliant with China PIPL. Learn how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.
privacy.introduction: Sound It is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) and other applicable laws of the People's Republic of China.
privacy.introContent:
Sound It (“we,” “us,” or “our”) is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with applicable laws and regulations of the People’s Republic of China, including the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), Cybersecurity Law, and Data Security Law.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacy.collectContent:
We collect only the information necessary to provide our services:

  • Basic Information — Name or username, phone number, email address, WeChat ID (if provided)
  • Account Information — Login credentials, profile details, preferences and activity
  • Transaction Information — Ticket purchases, payment confirmations, billing-related data
  • Device & Technical Information — IP address, device type, system logs and usage data
privacy.useContent:
We process your personal information for the following purposes:

  • To provide and operate platform services
  • To process transactions and ticket purchases
  • To manage user accounts
  • To communicate updates, notifications, and support
  • To improve platform functionality and user experience
  • To ensure platform security and prevent fraud
privacy.legalContent:
In accordance with PIPL, we process personal information based on:

  • User consent
  • Necessity for contract performance
  • Compliance with legal obligations
  • Reasonable necessity for platform operations
privacy.storageContent:
Your personal information will be stored within the People’s Republic of China.

Where cross-border data transfer is necessary, we will:

  • Obtain your separate consent
  • Conduct security assessments where required
  • Ensure compliance with applicable regulations
privacy.shareContent:
We do not sell your personal information.

We may share data with:

  • Service Providers — Payment service providers, cloud hosting providers, technical support partners
  • Event Organizers — User information relevant to ticket purchases may be shared with event organizers for event management purposes
  • Legal Authorities — Where required by law or regulatory authorities
privacy.sensitiveContent: We may process sensitive personal information (such as payment-related data) only when necessary and with enhanced protection measures. Users will be informed and consent will be obtained where required.
privacy.retentionContent:
We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to:

  • Fulfill service purposes
  • Comply with legal obligations
  • Resolve disputes

Data will be deleted or anonymized when no longer required.
privacy.rightsContent:
You have the following rights:

  • Right to access and copy your personal information
  • Right to correct or update inaccurate data
  • Right to delete your personal information
  • Right to withdraw consent
  • Right to restrict or refuse processing
  • Right to request explanation of data processing rules

To exercise your rights, contact: support@sounditent.com
privacy.securityContent:
We implement appropriate security measures, including:

  • Data encryption
  • Access control mechanisms
  • Secure storage systems

Despite these measures, no system can guarantee complete security.
privacy.thirdPartyContent: Our platform may include third-party services. These providers are responsible for their own data handling practices.
privacy.minorsContent: We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors under the age of 14 without guardian consent. If such data is identified, it will be promptly deleted.
privacy.changesContent: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Users will be notified of significant changes. Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.disputeContent: Any disputes arising from this Privacy Policy shall be governed by the laws of the People’s Republic of China and resolved through competent courts within China.
privacy.questionsSubtitle: Our team is here to help with any privacy concerns or requests.

recaps.title: Event Recaps
recaps.subtitle: Relive the best moments from our events
recaps.noRecapsDescription: Check back soon for photos and videos from our latest events.

refundPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about Sound It payment methods, refund eligibility, and dispute resolution.
refundPolicy.introduction: This policy outlines how payments are processed, refund eligibility, and how disputes are handled on Sound It.
refundPolicy.processingContent:
Payments may be processed via:

  • Integrated platform payment systems
  • Third-party providers (e.g., Alipay, WeChat Pay)
  • Organizer-provided payment methods (Premium tier)

All payments must be completed before ticket confirmation.
refundPolicy.pricingContent:
• Ticket prices are set by event organizers
  • Platform service fees may apply
  • All fees are displayed before checkout
refundPolicy.refundsContent:
General Rule

All ticket sales are final, except where required by applicable law, the event is cancelled, or the organizer approves a refund.

Event Cancellation

If an event is cancelled, users are eligible for a refund. Refunds will be processed via the original payment method.

Event Changes

If an event is modified (date, venue, content), refund eligibility is determined by the organizer.

User-Initiated Refunds

Refund requests due to personal reasons are subject to organizer approval and may incur processing fees.
refundPolicy.timeContent: Refunds (if approved) may take 5–15 business days depending on the payment provider.
refundPolicy.disputesContent: Users must first contact the event organizer. If unresolved, contact Sound It support. We act as a mediator, not a final adjudicator, unless required by law.
refundPolicy.fraudContent: We reserve the right to suspend suspicious transactions and request identity verification.
refundPolicy.liabilityContent: Sound It is not liable for organizer failure to deliver services or third-party payment system errors.
refundPolicy.haveQuestions: Have questions about payments or refunds?
refundPolicy.supportSubtitle: Our support team is here to help.

terms.metaDescription: Read Sound It's terms of service before using our platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to Sound It. By using our platform, you agree to these terms of service.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Sound It, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 18 years old to use our platform. By using Sound It, you represent that you meet this requirement.

account.title: Account Registration
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.

purchases.title: Ticket Purchases
purchases.content: All ticket purchases are subject to availability and the specific terms set by event organizers.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.content: You agree not to use our platform for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could harm Sound It or its users.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@soundit.com.

terms.acceptanceOfTermsContent: Sound It is a platform that connects users, event organizers, venues, and service providers. We enable event discovery, promotion, ticketing, and community engagement.
terms.platformServicesContent: Organizers and venues are responsible for the accuracy of event details, pricing, and fulfillment of services. Sound It does not take responsibility for event cancellations, changes, or disputes.
terms.byContinuingToUseSoundItChinaYouAcknowle: By continuing to use Sound It, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.changesToTermsContent: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.accountRegistrationContent: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and all activities under it.
terms.intellectualPropertyContent: You retain ownership of your content, but grant Sound It a license to display and promote it on the platform.
terms.contentAndConductContent:
You agree not to:

  • Use the platform for unlawful purposes
  • Post misleading or fraudulent content
  • Attempt to disrupt platform functionality
terms.terminationContent: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.pleaseReadTheseTermsCarefullyBeforeUsing: Welcome to Sound It. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.paymentsAndTicketsContent:
• Basic & Pro tiers use integrated platform payment systems.
  • Premium users may use their own payment methods (e.g., QR payments).
  • Sound It may charge service fees depending on your subscription plan.
terms.limitationOfLiabilityContent: Sound It is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from platform use.

userAgreement.metaDescription: Sound It User Agreement for users in China. Terms of use, account responsibilities, and platform rules.
userAgreement.introduction: This User Agreement is entered into between you and Sound It. By registering, accessing, or using the platform, you agree to be bound by this Agreement.
userAgreement.scopeContent:
Sound It provides a digital platform for:

  • Event discovery and promotion
  • Ticketing and payments
  • Interaction between users, organizers, artists, and vendors

We act as a platform service provider and are not the direct provider of events unless explicitly stated.
userAgreement.registrationContent:
Users must:

  • Provide true, accurate, and complete information
  • Maintain the security of their account
  • Bear responsibility for all activities under their account

We reserve the right to suspend accounts providing false or misleading information.
userAgreement.conductContent:
Users agree not to:

  • Violate Chinese laws and regulations
  • Publish false, illegal, or harmful content
  • Disrupt platform operations
  • Engage in fraudulent transactions
userAgreement.transactionsContent:
Sound It facilitates transactions between users and organizers. We are not a party to the transaction, except where explicitly stated.

Organizers are solely responsible for:

  • Event execution
  • Ticket validity
  • Refund obligations (subject to platform policy)
userAgreement.feesContent:
We may charge:

  • Service fees
  • Subscription fees (Basic, Pro, Premium tiers)

Premium users may use third-party payment methods (e.g., QR payments).
userAgreement.ipContent: All platform content, trademarks, and systems are owned by Sound It or its licensors. Users may not copy, distribute, or exploit platform content without permission.
userAgreement.liabilityContent:
To the maximum extent permitted by Chinese law, Sound It shall not be liable for:

  • Organizer-related disputes
  • Event cancellations or changes
  • Indirect or consequential damages
userAgreement.terminationContent: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate this Agreement or pose risk to platform security or users.
userAgreement.lawContent: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the People’s Republic of China. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent People’s Court at the location of the platform operator.
userAgreement.updatesContent: We reserve the right to update this Agreement. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
userAgreement.agreementBannerContent: By continuing to use Sound It, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this User Agreement.

organizerAgreement.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for event organizers using the Sound It platform.
organizerAgreement.introduction: This Organizer Agreement is entered into between Sound It and the individual or entity registering as an event organizer. By creating, listing, or managing events on Sound It, you agree to be bound by this Agreement.
organizerAgreement.roleContent:
Sound It provides a digital platform that enables Organizers to create and promote events, sell tickets, and engage with users.

Sound It acts solely as a technology service provider and does not organize, host, or control events, unless explicitly stated.
organizerAgreement.responsibilitiesContent:
You agree that you are solely responsible for:

  • Event Accuracy — Providing true, accurate, and complete event information; clearly stating event details (date, time, venue, pricing, restrictions)
  • Event Delivery — Ensuring the event is conducted as advertised; managing staff, logistics, and safety
  • Legal Compliance — Complying with all applicable laws and regulations in China and relevant jurisdictions; obtaining necessary licenses, permits, and approvals
organizerAgreement.ticketingContent:
• Pricing — Organizers have full control over ticket pricing
  • Ticket Fulfillment — Organizers must honor all valid tickets sold through the platform
  • Capacity Management — Organizers must ensure that ticket sales do not exceed venue capacity
organizerAgreement.paymentsContent:
Payment Methods

Payments may be processed through:

  • Platform-integrated systems
  • Third-party providers (e.g., Alipay, WeChat Pay)
  • Organizer-managed payment methods (Premium tier)

Settlement

Funds may be held temporarily for risk control. Settlement timelines may vary based on risk assessment.
organizerAgreement.refundsContent:
Organizer Responsibility

Organizers are solely responsible for defining refund policies and processing refunds where applicable.

Event Cancellation

In case of cancellation, organizers must notify users immediately and process refunds in accordance with applicable laws.

Disputes

Sound It may assist in dispute resolution but is not liable for final outcomes unless required by law.
organizerAgreement.feesContent:
Sound It may charge:

  • Service fees
  • Commission on ticket sales
  • Subscription fees

All applicable fees will be disclosed prior to use.
organizerAgreement.prohibitedContent:
Organizers shall not:

  • Publish false or misleading event information
  • Sell counterfeit or unauthorized tickets
  • Engage in fraudulent transactions
  • Violate public order, morality, or Chinese law
organizerAgreement.ipContent: Organizers retain ownership of their content but grant Sound It a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to display, promote, and market events on the platform.
organizerAgreement.dataContent:
Organizers must:

  • Handle user data in compliance with applicable laws
  • Use personal data only for event-related purposes
  • Not misuse, sell, or disclose user information without authorization
organizerAgreement.liabilityContent:
Organizer Liability

Organizers are solely liable for event execution, personal injury or damages, and legal violations.

Indemnification

Organizers agree to indemnify and hold Sound It harmless from any claims, losses, or damages arising from event-related issues, breach of this Agreement, or violation of laws.
organizerAgreement.platformRightsContent:
Sound It reserves the right to:

  • Suspend or remove events
  • Restrict or terminate organizer accounts
  • Withhold funds in case of suspected fraud or risk
organizerAgreement.riskContent:
We may implement risk control measures, including:

  • Delayed settlements
  • Identity verification
  • Transaction monitoring
organizerAgreement.terminationContent: This Agreement may be terminated if the Organizer violates any provision or the Platform determines risk or non-compliance.
organizerAgreement.lawContent: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the People’s Republic of China. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent People’s Court at the location of the platform operator.
organizerAgreement.updatesContent: We reserve the right to modify this Agreement at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
organizerAgreement.entireContent: This Agreement forms part of the overall platform terms, together with the User Agreement, Privacy Policy, and Payment & Refund Policy.
organizerAgreement.questionsSubtitle: Contact our team for organizer support.

crossBorderConsent.pageTitle: Cross-Border Data Transfer Consent | Sound It
crossBorderConsent.metaDescription: Consent for cross-border data transfer on Sound It.
crossBorderConsent.introduction: To provide our services, your personal information may be transferred to and processed in the People’s Republic of China.
crossBorderConsent.purposeContent: Your personal data may be stored and processed on servers located in China.
crossBorderConsent.protectionContent: Data protection laws in China may differ from those in your country. Sound It will take appropriate measures to protect your data in accordance with applicable laws.
crossBorderConsent.acknowledgmentContent: By continuing to use Sound It, you acknowledge and agree to the cross-border transfer of your personal data as described above.
crossBorderConsent.withdrawContent: You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting support@sounditent.com. Note that this may affect your ability to use certain platform features.

verificationPolicy.pageTitle: Real-Name & Phone Verification Policy | Sound It
verificationPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about Sound It identity verification requirements.
verificationPolicy.introduction: To comply with applicable laws and ensure platform security, Sound It may require users to complete identity verification.
verificationPolicy.requirementsContent:
Users may be required to provide:

  • Valid phone number
  • Verification code (SMS or app-based)
  • Real-name identification (where required by law)
verificationPolicy.purposeContent:
Verification is used to:

  • Prevent fraud and abuse
  • Ensure transaction security
  • Comply with regulatory requirements
verificationPolicy.responsibilityContent:
Users must:

  • Provide accurate and valid information
  • Not use false or third-party identities
verificationPolicy.consequencesContent:
Failure to complete verification may result in:

  • Limited access to platform features
  • Suspension of account
verificationPolicy.dataContent: All verification data will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable laws.
verificationPolicy.questionsSubtitle: Contact our support team for verification assistance.
